proposals.answer: Enterprise admins cannot manage their own user seats; every add/remove/reassign is a support ticket with a 1-3 business-day turnaround, so new hires sit without access during onboarding waves (20-30 tickets/week).
proposals.hint: Stated directly by CS from the renewal call; confirm the 20-30 tickets/week figure against support data to raise above 90.

proposals.answer: Enterprise admins at Banco Meridional (direct requesters), new hires blocked while a ticket is pending, and the support team (~40% of the account's tickets last quarter were seat changes).
proposals.hint: Per-segment user counts not in the brief; account usage data would raise confidence.
